name: Portal Journey: Portarius
short_description: Open a portal and begin your journey! Teleport rocks, water and your spaceship. Immerse in handcrafted colorful worlds, solve puzzles and be the first at the center of the Earth.
detailed_description:
Portarius - is a game where players must solve physical puzzles and challenges by opening portals to maneuvering objects, and themselves, through space while making their ways to the center of the Earth.

Key features:

  • Three chapters each with its own challenges and atmosphere
  • Portals make every journey unique
  • Artful and lush 2D graphics
  • Compete against other players on the global leader-board
  • Realistic physics
  • Great soundtrack

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Romanian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Swedish, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian
